prompt: Cinematic vertical video (9:16 aspect ratio), 8 seconds. A close-up shot of a pair of hands holding a premium, minimalist matte white portable neck fan. The hands slowly turn the fan to reveal the crisp LED digital display showing '100%'. Soft studio lighting, Apple-style product showcase, shallow depth of field, ultra-high resolution 4k, smooth slow panning motion.

Cinematic vertical video (9:16 aspect ratio), 8 seconds. A stylish young French woman walking down a sunny Parisian street in summer. She is wearing the white portable neck fan around her neck. A gentle breeze from the fan is slightly blowing her hair. She is smiling and looking refreshed. Shot on 35mm lens, natural bright sunlight, vibrant colors, lifestyle vlog aesthetic, 4k 60fps.

Cinematic vertical video (9:16 aspect ratio), 8 seconds. A handsome man in a smart-casual white shirt sitting at a modern bright office desk. He looks a bit warm, then places the minimalist white neck fan around his neck. He immediately closes his eyes in relief and exhales happily. Soft diffused window light, professional corporate environment, shallow depth of field, 4k resolution.

Cinematic vertical video (9:16 aspect ratio), 8 seconds. A fashionable person standing inside a slightly crowded, brightly lit modern metro train. They are wearing the white neck fan. While others look tired from the heat, this person looks incredibly cool, relaxed, and comfortable. Dynamic handheld camera movement, cinematic lighting, modern urban aesthetic, 4k 60fps.
